intro_highlights.text: A key and open challenge is the gap between natural language and action space.
intro_highlights.why_good: 一句话定义了该类工作的结构性难点。

intro_highlights.text: There has not been a systematic study of these designs across diverse embodiments.
intro_highlights.why_good: 研究空白表述精准，不夸张。

intro_highlights.text: For continuous action spaces ..., while for discrete actions ....
intro_highlights.why_good: 并列句式天然适合写“分场景结论”。

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 先肯定 MLLM 能力边界。
自然语言与动作空间错配。
按连续/离散动作分策略并给系统实验。
